test_cases.description: Verify the Second Party's signature appears on the generated B2B Business Agreement PDF.
test_cases.expected_result: The Second Party signature block shows the partner's actual signup signature image, not blank.
test_cases.actual_result: Generated agreement PDF now shows the Second Party's actual signup signature image in the signature block, no longer blank.
test_cases.comments: Core fix confirmed - this was the main reported defect.

test_cases.description: Verify the Second Party signature appears correctly in the agreement received via Send User Agreement Email.
test_cases.expected_result: Second Party signature is visible and matches the partner's actual signup signature.
test_cases.actual_result: Opened the emailed agreement from Send User Agreement Email; Second Party signature displayed and matched the partner's signup signature.
test_cases.comments: Verified via actual email inbox, not just confirmation modal.

test_cases.description: Verify the Second Party signature appears correctly in the agreement sent via Send Agreement to Other Email.
test_cases.expected_result: Second Party signature is visible and matches the partner's actual signup signature.
test_cases.actual_result: Opened the emailed agreement from Send Agreement to Other Email; Second Party signature displayed and matched the partner's signup signature.
test_cases.comments: Verified via actual email inbox, not just confirmation modal.

test_cases.description: Verify the signature shown in View Details matches the signature shown in the generated Business Agreement.
test_cases.expected_result: The signature shown in View Details is identical to the Second Party signature shown in the Business Agreement.
test_cases.actual_result: Compared the signature shown in View Details against the generated agreement PDF; both were identical.
test_cases.comments: No visual discrepancy found between the two touchpoints.

test_cases.description: Verify each partner's agreement shows their own signup signature, not another partner's.
test_cases.expected_result: Each partner's agreement displays their own distinct signup signature; no cross-contamination between partner records.
test_cases.actual_result: Generated agreements for two separate partner accounts; each showed its own correct signup signature with no cross-partner mixup.
test_cases.comments: Tested with 2 distinct partner accounts to rule out record mixup.

test_cases.description: Verify the Second Party signature image renders properly without distortion, cropping, or broken-image errors.
test_cases.expected_result: Signature image displays clearly, correctly sized, and without visual defects.
test_cases.actual_result: Zoomed into the Second Party signature block on the PDF; image rendered clearly at correct size, no distortion or broken-image icon.
test_cases.comments: No cropping or scaling issues observed.

test_cases.description: Verify the Second Party signature is identical whether the agreement is sent via Send User Agreement Email or Send Agreement to Other Email.
test_cases.expected_result: Signature shown is identical in both emailed agreements - no discrepancy between the two send paths.
test_cases.actual_result: Compared the Second Party signature in the User Agreement Email version against the Other Email version; both were identical.
test_cases.comments: Consistent output regardless of which send action is used.
